name: Omen Ritual Bird
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] {STR} At battle start. At turn start, for each [Arg2] Permanent {STR}, gain [Arg3] Temporary {STR}, up to [Arg4] Temporary {STR}, and lose Shield equals to half of the Temporary {STR} gained by that Relic at turn end.
lore: The withered corpse let out a screech.
